title: The Gorby (Research Version)
description: 5×5min @110% FTP / 5min rest — Zwift's iconic VO2max workout. Named for the struggle.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 110%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 110% for 5:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 5min at 110%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/5. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 5:00 at 110-110%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/5.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/5. 3 to go. You've accumulated 5min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/5. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/5. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2/5. 110%, 95-100 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 38% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 110% for 5:00. Next up: 5:00 recovery, then 5min at 110%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 110% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 53% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 25min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 40 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/5. 5:00 at 110%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 61% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 61% complete. Rep 4/5. Fatigue is real — hold form. 110%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 20min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 15 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 5:00 at 110%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 5:00 at 110%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 110-110% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 84% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
